content_body: Dear Knight Family, Thank you for sharing your cabin with us. It was a much-needed R&R weekend, the first in a long time. Gary – Matt and I wanted to thank you for your encouraging words this past time for Matt’s surgery and your understanding. It has been a rough year and this weekend we were in a place to count our many blessings, and be reminded of God’s Grace and Goodness. We hope to return next year with friends and family. God Bless.
title: Vacationing with Cabin Rentals of Georgia
